inputs.label: Annual Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Amount you plan to contribute each year to the IRA (pre-tax for Traditional, after tax for Roth).

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you plan to contribute each year to the IRA (pre-tax for Traditional, after tax for Roth).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yıl IRA'ya katkıda bulunmayı planladığınız tutar (Geleneksel için vergi öncesi, Roth için vergi sonrası).
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den Sie jährlich zur IRA beitragen möchten (vor Steuern für traditionell, nach Steuern für Roth).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous prévoyez de contribuer chaque année au compte IRA (avant impôt pour le traditionnel, après impôt pour le Roth).
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto que planea contribuir cada año a la IRA (antes de impuestos para la Tradicional, después de impuestos para la Roth).

inputs.label: Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: Age at which you plan to retire and start withdrawals.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age at which you plan to retire and start withdrawals.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emekli olmayı ve çekimlere başlamayı planladığınız yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter, in dem Sie in den Ruhestand gehen und mit Abhebungen beginnen möchten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel vous prévoyez de prendre votre retraite et de commencer les retraits.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad a la que planea jubilarse y comenzar los retiros.

inputs.label: Current Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your current marginal income tax rate (e.g., 22 for 22%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Your current marginal income tax rate (e.g., 22 for 22%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut marjinal gelir vergisi oranınız (örneğin, %22 için 22).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre taux marginal d'imposition actuel (par exemple, 22 pour 22 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Su tasa marginal de impuesto sobre la renta actual (ej., 22 para 22%).

inputs.label: Expected Retirement Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your expected marginal tax rate in retirement (e.g., 22 for 22%).

label_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition attendu à la retraite
label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto esperada en la jubilación

businessContext_i18n.en: Your expected marginal tax rate in retirement (e.g., 22 for 22%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilikte beklenen marjinal vergi oranınız (örneğin, %22 için 22).
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihr erwarteter Grenzsteuersatz im Ruhestand (z. B. 22 für 22%).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre taux marginal d'imposition attendu à la retraite (par exemple, 22 pour 22 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Su tasa marginal de impuesto esperada en la jubilación (ej., 22 para 22%).

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected average annual return on investments (assumed > 0%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average annual return on investments (assumed > 0%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımlarda beklenen ortalama yıllık getiri (%0'dan büyük olduğu varsayılır).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement annuel moyen attendu sur les investissements (supposé > 0 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento anual promedio esperado de las inversiones (asumido > 0%).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
